name: post-auth-pwa-redirect
description: Regression fixture: first tap opens Google correctly, but OAuth completion opens wa.colmeio.com/home in Chrome/PWA instead of returning to WASM Agent.

firstScreen.uiText: WASM Agent Sign in with Google

firstTap.uiText: Sign in - Google Accounts Use your Google Account
firstTap.activityText:
mResumedActivity: ActivityRecord{fixture u0 com.android.chrome/org.chromium.chrome.browser.ChromeTabbedActivity t1}
Intent { act=android.intent.action.VIEW cat=[android.intent.category.BROWSABLE] dat=https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth?client_id=fixture&state=fixture-session-000000000000000002 cmp=com.android.chrome/.Main }

postAuth.uiText: WASM Agent Home opened in browser
postAuth.activityText:
mResumedActivity: ActivityRecord{fixture u0 com.android.chrome/org.chromium.chrome.browser.ChromeTabbedActivity t1}
Intent { act=android.intent.action.VIEW dat=https://wa.colmeio.com/home?auth_code=fixture cmp=com.android.chrome/.Main }
